text_original: When a reconciliation is effected (between two parties) after a great animosity, there is sure to be a grudge remaining (in the mind of the one who was wrong).
text_normalized: When a reconciliation is effected (between two parties) after a great animosity, there is sure to be a grudge remaining (in the mind of the one who was wrong).

text_original: And how can this be beneficial (to the other)?
text_normalized: And how can this be beneficial (to the other)?

text_original: Therefore (to guard against this), the sage keeps the left-hand portion of the record of the engagement, and does not insist on the (speedy) fulfilment of it by the other party.
text_normalized: Therefore (to guard against this), the sage keeps the left-hand portion of the record of the engagement, and does not insist on the (speedy) fulfilment of it by the other party.

text_original: (So), he who has the attributes (of the Dao) regards (only) the conditions of the engagement, while he who has not those attributes regards only the conditions favourable to himself.
text_normalized: (So), he who has the attributes (of the Dao) regards (only) the conditions of the engagement, while he who has not those attributes regards only the conditions favourable to himself.

text_original: In the Way of Heaven, there is no partiality of love; it is always on the side of the good man.
text_normalized: In the Way of Heaven, there is no partiality of love; it is always on the side of the good man.
